title: Issue #780 native desktop notifications
description: Implement default-off, privacy-safe native Electron notifications for settled thread attention transitions with replay-safe derivation and exact click navigation.
expectedOutputs: Persisted default-off desktop setting and UI
Pure transition tracker with focused tests
Electron native notification delivery and focus policy
Validation evidence and draft PR handoff
acceptanceCriteria: running to completed emits once only while unfocused
running to failed emits once only while unfocused
Reconnect replay and reseed emit no false positive
Archived or removed thread does not notify
Denied or unavailable native delivery is non-fatal
Click opens the correct environment and thread
Notification contains no sensitive dynamic content
No sounds pets overlays tray mobile push or daemon changes
